description: Zev live project registry for AI Manager. This file teaches the manager where each live project lives, what health signals matter, and which owner-button names belong to it.

projects.name: AI Manager
projects.interaction: Own the manager registry, reports, and safe orchestration rules. Inspect and report freely; commit/push only after git-guard.

projects.name: Codex AI Systems
projects.interaction: Source of truth for Zev's Codex workflow. Use save-codex-systems after user-level .codex changes. Never commit secrets or live queues.

projects.name: Bossman
projects.interaction: Pinned-project nudge and dispatch layer. It can queue follow-ups through the local bridge, but production, repo history, billing, secrets, and risky work stay behind existing approval gates.

projects.name: ZDH Live Project Manager
projects.interaction: Desktop dashboard, LiveKit experiments, Sponder pages, and local planning. Worktree is currently cluttered; do not mass-clean or push without explicit review.

projects.name: Mr.SEO
projects.interaction: SEO and AI-answer visibility control room. Use Mr.SEO data for active site roster, focus site, writer queues, rankings, and owner-fact blockers. Ranking/API/account data requires owner buttons.

projects.name: MrReviewer
projects.interaction: Website/app audit engine. Use it to score, crawl, screenshot, and generate Bossman packets. A 404 public dashboard is a real not-running signal.

projects.name: ZDH AI Dashboard
projects.interaction: Web/desktop dashboard for local project and Bossman visibility. Use npm scripts for dev, full local API, build, and desktop packaging.

projects.name: Botox Tel Aviv
projects.interaction: Medical/beauty local SEO site. Do not invent treatment, provider, pricing, credential, safety, or proof claims. Analytics/GTM and owner facts require owner buttons.

projects.name: English Comedy TLV
projects.interaction: Event/discovery site. Preserve event, ticket, venue, and form accuracy. Multiple worktrees exist for hotfixes; choose the worktree that matches the task before editing.

projects.name: ExplainMyBusiness
projects.interaction: Static explainer-video lead site. Codex can edit static pages and retest; Cloudflare DNS, Vercel deploy/domain buttons, reputation review forms, and inbox proof are owner-only.

projects.name: Israel Digital Army
projects.interaction: Advocacy/entity site. Treat factual claims, public positioning, and reputation-sensitive copy carefully; owner facts and account integrations require gates.

projects.name: IsraelOffshore
projects.interaction: Current Mr.SEO focus site. Codex can patch on-page clarity and verify live; form activation, proof claims, client examples, and pricing facts require owner confirmation.

projects.name: Web Design Israel
projects.interaction: SEO-first agency site. Canonical repo is webdesignisrael.com; the wrong-remote archive folder is read-only history. Build generated pages before deploy checks.

projects.name: ZDH Consulting
projects.interaction: Main agency site. Codex can edit/build/test repo-contained work; GA4, Search Console, FormSubmit inbox verification, and production account actions are owner-only.

projects.name: ZDH Sales
projects.interaction: Static B2B sales site. Keep FormSubmit token endpoint intact; destination inbox activation is owner-only. Verify thank-you and sitemap after changes.

projects.name: Zev Hecht
projects.interaction: Personal/entity site. Work in the Documents repo, not the Desktop folders that resolve to C:\Users\zev. Vercel production promotion is owner-only.

projects.name: Icecreamfinder
projects.interaction: Maps/Places ice cream app. Do not expose unrestricted keys; Supabase/Vercel env vars and deployment dashboard actions are owner-only. Verify versioned assets live after pushes.

projects.name: Sponder Standup
projects.interaction: Public site is live, but Mr.SEO marks Sponder/Yohay as skipped by owner. Do not generate active SEO, ranking, owner, or writer work until Zev re-enables it.

projects.name: ContactFormBlaster
projects.interaction: Authorized form QA/fill tool. Never run against arbitrary domains. Dry-run by default; real submit requires explicit --submit and authorization acknowledgement.

projects.name: FormBlaster
projects.interaction: Local/desktop form automation project. GitHub auth and remote actions may be owner-gated; keep authorization and anti-abuse constraints front and center.

projects.name: Yishai Fleisher Build Israel
projects.interaction: Static Build Israel redesign repo. Local repo currently has no origin; GitHub repo creation/push requires owner GitHub authentication.

projects.name: Book Production
projects.interaction: Book/manuscript and illustration production. Not a live web service; manage as creative source material and avoid cleanup of drafts/assets without explicit instruction.
